name: Constant-time string compare
task: Create /tmp/eval_ct/ct.py with constant_time_compare(a, b) returning True iff a == b, with a comparison whose runtime is independent of where the strings differ. Accept str and bytes. Different lengths return False.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_ct/ct.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); C = mod.constant_time_compare; assert C('abc','abc'); assert not C('abc','abd'); assert not C('abc','abcd'); assert C(b'\x00\x01', b'\x00\x01'); print('OK')
